key_features: Fetch-based SSE client with POST request
Dual completion signals ([DONE] sentinel and parsed.done flag)
Error detail extraction from response JSON
Cancel and reset operations for cleanup
useCallback memoization for stable function references
Disabled state during generation (model, prompt, buttons)
Stop button during streaming, Generate button otherwise
Streaming output display with spinner and max-height scrolling
Accept & Insert button for output integration

patterns_discovered.description: SSE using Server-Sent Events format with 'data: ' prefix, line-based splitting, JSON payload parsing, and [DONE] sentinel termination
Incomplete final line retained in buffer variable; processed after next chunk arrives, preventing line fragmentation
AbortController returned to caller, stored in useRef, allows external cancellation of ongoing fetch while properly handling AbortError
Streaming service uses callback object (onToken, onDone, onError) rather than promises/observables for incremental updates

patterns_discovered.pattern: UI State Machine for Async Operations
patterns_discovered.description: Three-state pattern (idle, generating, error) controlling button states, input disabling, and conditional rendering

gotchas_discovered.description: TextDecoder must use { stream: true } option to properly handle multi-byte UTF-8 sequences split across chunks. Without it, incomplete bytes at chunk boundaries cause decoding errors.
Aborting a fetch triggers an AbortError that must be explicitly caught and suppressed, otherwise error callback fires inappropriately on user-initiated cancellation
Code checks for both '[DONE]' sentinel string AND parsed.done property. Mismatch between these signals could cause premature or delayed completion
Error response parsing assumes error.detail exists; fallback uses HTTP status. May miss error information from different API error formats

Calling generate() twice rapidly aborts the first request's controller before nullifying controllerRef, then immediately creates a new one. First request's onError would then fire but controllerRef is already overwritten
Button only appears when status === 'idle' AND output exists. If user resets, output clears, so button disappears even during the same generation cycle

approach_outcome.summary: Successfully implemented full SSE streaming pipeline with three-layer architecture: service layer for HTTP streaming, hook layer for React state management, and component layer for UI

architecture.layer_1: streaming.ts - Low-level SSE client handling fetch, event parsing, buffer management, and cancellation
architecture.layer_2: useGeneration.ts - React hook exposing high-level state (status, output, error) and operations (generate, cancel, reset)
architecture.layer_3: GenerationPanel.tsx - UI component with model selection, prompt input, streaming output display, and result acceptance

key_accomplishments: Proper SSE event parsing with line-based protocol
React state synchronized with stream callbacks

recommendations.item: Add retry logic with exponential backoff for failed generation requests
recommendations.rationale: Network failures are transient; current implementation fails immediately without retry

recommendations.item: Fix controllerRef race condition by tracking request ID and validating before calling callbacks
recommendations.rationale: Rapid successive generate() calls can fire callbacks from aborted requests

recommendations.item: Add timeout mechanism to abort stalled streams after N seconds of no data
recommendations.rationale: Prevents indefinite hanging on slow/stalled server connections

recommendations.item: Add unit tests for streaming edge cases: empty chunks, malformed JSON, incomplete UTF-8 sequences
recommendations.rationale: Buffer and decoder logic is error-prone; needs validation

recommendations.item: Persist generation history in localStorage or state management for user reference
recommendations.rationale: Users may want to review previous generations or compare outputs

recommendations.item: Import GenerationRequest and GenerationResponse types to ensure they are properly exported from types/content
recommendations.rationale: Implicit any type if types file is missing or incomplete

recommendations.item: Add aria-live region to output display for screen reader announcements during streaming
recommendations.rationale: Visually impaired users cannot see streaming progress indicator
